title: Resize Columns
excerpt: Remove the restriction to resize columns based on board ownership or board permissions.  All users (Members, Viewers, & Guests) should have the option to resize columns that best suit their viewing needs.

posts.author: gbick (Greg Bickford)
posts.cookedHtml: Remove the restriction to resize columns based on board ownership or board permissions. All users (Members, Viewers, & Guests) should have the option to resize columns that best suit their viewing needs.
